Explore the fixture

Use this page to inspect heading and paragraph conversion.

Nested navigation

These links sit inside nested div elements.

Getting Started API Route API Reference

Inline examples

Common tags include span text, strong text, and inline code.

  • Open the reference notes.
  • Compare nested links with generated Markdown paths.

Code blocks

The fixture includes source-style and shell-style blocks. 

const result = await Engine.execute(input, {
  dryRun: false,
});

if (result.isOk()) {
  console.log(result.value.createdFilePaths);
}
npm run fixture:engine:phase1:write
find packages/engine/.manual-runs/phase-1-small-site/dist -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort
cat packages/engine/.manual-runs/phase-1-small-site/build-result.json
